name: NotebookLM
description: NotebookLM Enterprise (part of Gemini Enterprise) provides programmatic creation and management of NotebookLM notebooks on Google Cloud.

auth_methods.note: Docs instruct creating service accounts, using gcloud to obtain access tokens, and show Authorization: Bearer <access_token>; this indicates OAuth2 bearer tokens via service accounts or user credentials. 'service_account' mapped to 'other' to fit schema; 'none_public' included to reflect no anonymous/no API-key-only access.

credential_access.note: The official AI Enterprise product page positions AI Enterprise (including NotebookLM) as an organizational/enterprise offering and the primary call-to-action to get started is 'Contact sales', suggesting access may be sales-gated; however, it does not explicitly confirm whether NotebookLM Enterprise API credentials can be obtained self-serve in any billed Google Cloud project.

api_surface.note: API reference documents REST endpoints for creating, getting, patching, and deleting notebooks and includes request/response schemas, indicating a broad REST surface.

buildability.note: The setup guide documents technical prerequisites (Google Cloud project, billing enabled, enabling the NotebookLM Enterprise API, creating a service account, and using Bearer access tokens), but it does not clarify whether the NotebookLM Enterprise API is generally available to any self-serve Google Cloud project or requires enterprise enrollment/sales approval to actually obtain working access; this uncertainty blocks buildability determination.
